steps: Contact Nordea Custody to request correction of Nokia Oyj dividend withholding from 13.5% to 15% under FI-NO treaty
Submit formal claim with calculation showing EUR 3,607.50 overpayment (expected net EUR 204,425 vs received EUR 208,032.50)
If custodian cannot correct, file refund application directly with Vero using Form 6163e/6167e for the excess withholding
Reference Nordic Tax Withholding Agreement provisions that should have applied the correct 15% rate automatically

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
